name: codegraph_memory_search
description: Searches memories with hybrid BM25 + semantic + graph proximity. USE WHEN: recalling past knowledge — previous debugging sessions, architectural decisions, known issues. ALWAYS SEARCH before starting complex tasks. Returns results array (id, title, content, kind, score, tags, created_at) sorted by relevance. Filter with kinds (debug_context, architectural_decision, known_issue, convention, project_context), tags, or codeContext (node IDs for proximity boosting). Set currentOnly=false to include invalidated memories.

codeContext.description: Code node IDs for proximity boosting
